events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json` — verdict is `fail`/`critical` given the combination of unattended open holes, an improvised/uninspected scaffold, missing guardrails, blocked egress/extinguishers, and cords across walkways. Immediate actions center on stopping work, tagging out the scaffold, covering/guarding fall hazards, clearing egress, and requiring a competent-person re-inspection before resuming, per OSHA General Duty and 1926 Subpart L.
